name: macOS Sidebar Structure
description: Verifies sidebar components: list exists, active model section, empty state or model list, downloading section, benchmarks section, conversations, three-column layout. Updated for sidebar cleanup (downloadable models removed, download progress added).

steps.description: Verify active model empty state exists in sidebar (no model loaded at launch).
Verify sidebar empty state or model list exists. When no models are on device and no downloads active, the empty state should be visible.
Verify benchmarks section exists via dashboard link.
Scroll sidebar to find the New Chat button and conversations section.
Verify New Chat button exists in sidebar.
Verify three-column layout: sidebar, detail, chat area.
Verify chat area elements exist in column 3.
